'''Joddar''' was a [[Lizard Warrior]] from the [[Valley of the Lizard Warriors]] on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].

==Biography==
[[File:Joddar.png|thumb|right|Joddar fought with a cutlass.]]
When [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] tried to cross the valley, Joddar and the exiled [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Graak (lawbreaker)/Legends|Graak]] forced the two young Ewoks into a game of hunting where they were the prey. Joddar went after the Ewoks, but ended up falling prey to an [[Endorian swamp beast]]. Wicket and Teebo saved him and, in his gratitude, he granted them his protection, and in turn saved their lives.

{{Char-stub}}
